mapper.sql: aed.role_id, aed.employee_id, aed.dept_id, aed.enabled_flag, aed.id, aed.create_time, aed.create_by, aed.update_time, aed.update_by

${tAlias}.role_id as ${tAlias}_role_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,(select fd.dept_name from fnd_dept fd where fd.id = aed.dept_id) as dept_name, (select fd.parent_id from fnd_dept fd where fd.id = aed.dept_id) as parent_id, (select top 1 fu.email from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = aed.employee_id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as email from ac_emp_depts aed
mapper.insert: insert into ac_emp_depts (role_id, employee_id, dept_id, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, data_type) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataType, jdbcType = VARCHAR})

insert into ac_emp_depts_temp (role_id, employee_id, dept_id, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update ac_emp_depts set role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into ac_emp_depts_temp(role_id, employee_id, dept_id, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, department, administrative_office) select 17, (select ISNULL( (select pe.id from pm_employee pe where right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1 ),-1) ), -1, 1, getDate(), -1, getDATE(), -1, #{department, jdbcType= VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select top 1 isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) from ac_emp_depts aed join fnd_user fu on aed.employee_id = fu.employee_id join pm_employee pe on pe.id = fu.employee_id where fu.enabled_flag = 1 and aed.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and aed.data_type = 'team' and aed.dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_users_roles (user_id, role_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values(#{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ,(select fr.id from fnd_role fr where fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR}), GETDATE(), #{createBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getdate(), #{createBy, jdbcType = BIGINT})
